code: const DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL='admin@elitehotels.com';const AUTH_STORAGE_KEY='auth_state';const AUTH_TTL_MS=8*60*60*1000;export function getAdminEmail(){return(process.env.REACT_APP_ADMIN_EMAIL||DEFAULT_ADMIN_EMAIL).trim().toLowerCase();}export function isAdminUser(user){if(!user){return false;}if(user.is_admin===true){return true;}return String(user.email||'').trim().toLowerCase()===getAdminEmail();}export function setStoredAuth(_ref){let{user,token,expiresInSeconds}=_ref;const authState={user,token,expiresAt:Date.now()+(expiresInSeconds||AUTH_TTL_MS/1000)*1000};localStorage.setItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(authState));}export function clearStoredAuth(){localStorage.removeItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);}export function getStoredAuth(){try{const rawUser=localStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);if(!rawUser){return null;}const parsed=JSON.parse(rawUser);if(parsed&&parsed.user&&parsed.token&&parsed.expiresAt){if(Date.now()>parsed.expiresAt){clearStoredAuth();return null;}return parsed;}return parsed;}catch(error){clearStoredAuth();return null;}}export function getStoredUser(){var _getStoredAuth;return((_getStoredAuth=getStoredAuth())===null||_getStoredAuth===void 0?void 0:_getStoredAuth.user)||null;}export function getAuthToken(){var _getStoredAuth2;return((_getStoredAuth2=getStoredAuth())===null||_getStoredAuth2===void 0?void 0:_getStoredAuth2.token)||null;}
